mapper.sql: id, vid, userId, scanId, height, leftUpperArmGirth, rightUpperArmGirth, bustGirth, waistGirth, hipGirth, rightThighGirth, leftThighGirth, rightCalfGirth, leftCalfGirth, gymEngineId, createTime
mapper.insert: insert into body_dimension (id, vid, userId, scanId, height, leftUpperArmGirth, rightUpperArmGirth, bustGirth, waistGirth, hipGirth, rightThighGirth, leftThighGirth, rightCalfGirth, leftCalfGirth, createTime ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{vid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{scanId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{height,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leftUpperArmGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rightUpperArmGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bustGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{waistGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hipGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rightThighGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leftThighGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rightCalfGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leftCalfGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

insert into body_dimension
id,
vid,
userId,
scanId,
height,
leftUpperArmGirth,
rightUpperArmGirth,
bustGirth,
waistGirth,
hipGirth,
rightThighGirth,
leftThighGirth,
rightCalfGirth,
leftCalfGirth,
gymEngineId,
createTime,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{vid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{scanId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{height,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{leftUpperArmGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{rightUpperArmGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{bustGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{waistGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{hipGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{rightThighGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{leftThighGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{rightCalfGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{leftCalfGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{gymEngineId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update body_dimension
vid = #{vid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
scanId = #{scanId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
height = #{height,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
leftUpperArmGirth = #{leftUpperArmGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rightUpperArmGirth = #{rightUpperArmGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bustGirth = #{bustGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
waistGirth = #{waistGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hipGirth = #{hipGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rightThighGirth = #{rightThighGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
leftThighGirth = #{leftThighGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rightCalfGirth = #{rightCalfGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
leftCalfGirth = #{leftCalfGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update body_dimension set vid = #{vid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, scanId = #{scanId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, height = #{height,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, leftUpperArmGirth = #{leftUpperArmGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rightUpperArmGirth = #{rightUpperArmGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bustGirth = #{bustGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, waistGirth = #{waistGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hipGirth = #{hipGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rightThighGirth = #{rightThighGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, leftThighGirth = #{leftThighGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rightCalfGirth = #{rightCalfGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, leftCalfGirth = #{leftCalfGirth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select leftUpperArmGirth,rightUpperArmGirth,bustGirth,waistGirth,hipGirth,rightThighGirth,leftThighGirth,rightCalfGirth,leftCalfGirth, gymEngineId from body_dimension where userId = #{userId} ORDER BY createTime DESC LIMIT 2
SELECT scanId FROM body_dimension WHERE userId = #{userId} ORDER BY createTime DESC LIMIT 1
